description_long: This is a low-poly, angular combat tactical vehicle with a predominantly olive green exterior and geometric armor plating. The vehicle features a cylindrical turret mounted centrally on the roof, equipped with a visible barrel and what appears to be a coaxial machine gun. The sides are fitted with large, black caterpillar tracks supported by multiple road wheels, providing robust off-road mobility. The front is sharply sloped, enhancing deflection and protection, while the rear includes a protruding structure, possibly for towing or additional equipment. The vehicle's surface is matte, with no visible insignia or markings, and the design emphasizes functionality and protection. The overall build suggests a focus on armored combat and tactical deployment in urban or rugged environments.
description: An angular, olive green armored combat vehicle with a central turret, caterpillar tracks, and sharply sloped armor plating. The design is robust and functional, emphasizing protection and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply sloped armor, central turret, and the front ends of the caterpillar tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the tracks, turret with barrel, and a rear protruding structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, rear structure, and the ends of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, and rear structure from the opposite side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon barrel and one coaxial machine gun mount on the central turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with angular, sloped armor plating of moderate apparent thickness; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
